title: Consistent Translucent Glass
description: Makes Glass as translucent as Stained Glass!
body:
Simply gives Glass the same translucence values as vanilla Stained Glass (apart from the cutout), with the goal to come as close as possible to vanilla and how I would expect Mojang to implement translucent glass. No nearly invisible blocks. Just nicer and consistent glass in the most vanilla way possible. Features: - Glass, Glass Panes, and Beacons all have translucent textures. - Glass translucence is perfectly consistent with Stained Glass. - CTM connected textures are supported for Glass and Glass Panes. ## ### MintRefresh:
